# STRAT.054 ? 4 Disciplines of Execution

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** performance_excellence
**Domain:** PERFORMANCE_EXCELLENCE
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Focus on wildly important; act on lead measures; compelling scoreboard; cadence of accountability; WIGs; lag vs lead measures

## Application
Choose WIGs (wildly important goals); identify lead measures; create visible scoreboard; weekly accountability; focus amid whirlwind

## Key Values
- Focus
- Lead measures
- Visibility
- Accountability
- Execution discipline
